expectations.text: Selects CREATE mode (not COPY) since user said 'no reference video' and wants to design from scratch
expectations.evidence: Line 9: '1. Mode Selected: CREATE' with clear reasoning: 'user explicitly asked to make something original with no reference video'

expectations.text: Identifies portrait 9:16 and warns about I2V API limitation -- recommends T2V mode for portrait
expectations.evidence: Lines 23-35: Extensive I2V limitation discussion. Line 33: 'Decision: Use T2V (text-to-video) mode for all 4 scenes.' Quotes the skill's aspect ratio decision tree about INVALID_ARGUMENT for portrait I2V.

expectations.text: Follows CREATE mode Phase 0-5 workflow: project setup -> asset collection -> format -> scene design -> music -> generate
expectations.evidence: Phases 0-7 outlined: Phase 0 (project setup) -> Phase 1 (asset collection) -> Phase 2 (video format) -> Phase 3 (scene design + image gen) -> Phase 4 (video gen T2V) -> Phase 5 (music) -> Phase 6 (stitch) -> Phase 7 (logo overlay)

expectations.text: Uses model_id='gemini-pro-image' for all image generation (not gemini-flash-image)
expectations.evidence: Lines 233-237: Explicitly discusses overriding user's NB2 preference. Line 243: model_id='gemini-pro-image'. All 4 generate_image calls use gemini-pro-image.

expectations.text: Asks about character references before proceeding (Phase 1 Asset Collection)
expectations.evidence: Lines 44-79: Extensive 'Questions I Would Ask Before Proceeding' section with PRODUCT IMAGE, CHARACTER, LOGO, MUSIC, and SCENE BUILDING questions

expectations.text: Suggests scene templates or builds SEALCAM+ JSON for the 4 described scenes
